obs: Asked about oils for stir-frying; assistant recommended high smoke point oils: vegetable, canola, peanut oil for best results.

Recently got oil change at Exxon station; oil was dirty. Used free coupon, paid $25 instead of full price.
Self-described 'pretty dirty driving habit.' Considering WeatherTech floor mats for protection due to frequent dirt/mud exposure.
Looking for car insurance deals; interested in comparison tools: NerdWallet, Insurance.com, Bankrate recommended.

Inquired whether heart disease can be reversed with lifestyle changes alone, or if medication always necessary.
Had delicious Thai curry at cooking class; interested in making green curry. Researched curry paste brands: Maesri, Mae Ploy, Thai Kitchen.

After food change: Max's digestion improved, stools firmer, farting decreased. More playful, loves walks with new retractable leash.

Has favorite park route. Max plays off-leash there, loves exploring, sniffing, running freely.

Interested in fantasy with strong female leads. Considering starting The Wheel of Time series despite its 14-book length.

Noticed significant improvement in breathing, stamina after increasing run distance. Doing strength training (squats, lunges) for form/injury prevention.
Following diet/nutrition plan, tracking macros/calories with app. Focusing lean protein, complex carbs, healthy fats. Improved energy, recovery.
Owns road bike; few-year-old car without hitch. Interested in roof-mounted bike rack to carry one bike to nearby trail.
Thinking of selling old skateboard (good condition, unused for years) on Craigslist or Facebook Marketplace.

Using soaker hose for watering. Interested in slug/snail deterrents: copper barriers, crushed eggshells, coffee grounds, beer traps.
Exploring permaculture principles, companion planting for sustainable, self-sufficient garden ecosystem.
Working on WordPress product search REST endpoint; troubleshooting stock availability filter using _stock_status meta field.
Concerned about home maintenance risks; generating comprehensive risk list for potential costly damage/insurance payouts.

Interested in learning about podcast production, specifically sound design and editing techniques.

Interested in nighttime cityscape photography. Planning coast photography trip next month; wants to capture seascapes.

Marketing Villa Gennaro Italian restaurant: 75 Lincoln Highway, Edison, NJ 08820; (732) 549-8554. BYOB establishment. Creating menu-based social posts.
